Landing.title: Own a piece of the energy transition.
Landing.sub: A transparent pool funding verified green projects. Every figure traces back to chain in two taps — no surprises, ever.
Landing.countersNote: Live from the vault contract. Tap any figure for its on-chain proof.
Landing.howSub: One pool, many projects. You deposit USDC and receive shares in a curated, oracle-scored portfolio.
Landing.step1Body: From one dollar. You always see what you receive before you sign.
Landing.step2Body: Shares — technically SEP-41 tokens called HBS. Your stake in the whole pool.
Landing.step3Body: Capital is deployed to verified, oracle-scored green projects.
Landing.step4Body: Share price reflects expected returns. Withdraw your liquid share anytime.
Landing.verifyBody: Trust is shown, not claimed. The contracts are public, the oracle cadence is documented, and the return formula is written out in plain sight.

Connect.title: Welcome — come in.
Connect.sub: Two ways in, both equally welcome. No wrong door.
Connect.walletBody: Connect Freighter, xBull, Albedo, Lobstr, Hana, or WalletConnect.
Connect.newBody: We'll create a secure wallet for you and help you add funds. No jargon required.
Connect.edu1Body: One curated pool funds many verified green projects. You own a share of all of it.
Connect.edu2Body: Shares — technically SEP-41 tokens called HBS. They track your stake in the pool.
Connect.edu3Body: You can withdraw what the pool holds liquid; the rest is working in projects. We always show how much is available.

Explore.title: Where the pool works
Explore.sub: Every project the pool funds, with oracle-verified scores. Explore freely — connecting a wallet comes later.

Deposit.amountH1: How much would you like to invest?
Deposit.preview: You'll receive ≈ <num>{shares} HBS</num> · share price <num>{price}</num> · network fee <num>< $0.01</num>
Deposit.liquidLine: Today the pool is 29% liquid — you can withdraw your liquid share anytime.
Deposit.reasonMin: Enter an amount of at least 1 USDC
Deposit.reviewH1: You're investing {amount} USDC in the pool
Deposit.reviewBody: Your shares represent a stake in the whole pool, which funds 14 verified projects. You can withdraw your liquid share at any time.
Deposit.pendingTx: tx a91f…3c0d · view on Stellar Expert ↗
Deposit.successBody: You received {shares} HBS and now back 14 verified projects.

Portfolio.liquidCaption: Your liquid share. The rest is working in projects.
Portfolio.impactBody: Your stake helps fund 14 verified projects across 6 countries.

Withdraw.capMessage: The pool holds limited liquidity right now; the rest is working in projects. You can withdraw up to ${cap} today, or any part of it.
Withdraw.reasonExceeds: Amount exceeds what is liquid right now — use Max
Withdraw.reasonMin: Enter an amount of at least 1 USDC
Withdraw.successBody: <num>${amount} USDC</num> is on its way to your wallet. Thanks for being part of the pool.
